title: scorzonera candollei subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Scorzonera candollei subsp. tenuifolia is a lesser-known species of the scorzonera plant, also known as black salsify or viper's grass, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Scorzonera candollei subsp. tenuifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the roots, which can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or added to food, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
